items.title: Will Platinum Card Upgrades and Ad Platform Launch Reshape American Express' (AXP) Premium Brand Narrative?
items.description: American Express recently launched significant enhancements to its U.S. Consumer and Business Platinum Cards, expanded benefits, and unveiled the Amex Ads digital advertising platform, while also declaring a regular quarterly dividend of US$0.82 per share payable on November 10, 2025. In addition, American Express Canada achieved top rankings in the J.D. Power 2025 Canada Credit Card Satisfaction Study for both overall issuer and annual fee card categories, marking continued recognition for...
